extDescription.message: Close all active tabs in your browser with one click

popupDescription.message: Run the action selected in Options. You can choose how tabs are closed before executing.

popupWarning.message: Caution: some modes may close all browser windows. Review your selected mode in Options.

closeAllTabsButton.description: Text for the execute button in popup

themeLightAriaLabel.description: Aria label for light theme button

themeDarkAriaLabel.description: Aria label for dark theme button

popupOptionsButton.description: Text for options button in popup

popupLicenseButton.description: Text for license button in popup

optionsSubtitle.message: Choose what should happen when you use the popup action.

optionsWarning.message: Some actions are destructive and may close all windows.

modeOpenNewAfterCloseExceptPinnedTitle.message: Open new tab after closing except pinned

modeOpenNewAfterCloseExceptPinnedDesc.message: Keeps pinned tabs and opens one new tab.

modeCloseAllKeepBrowserTitle.message: Close all tabs (including pinned) without closing browser

modeCloseAllKeepBrowserDesc.message: Opens one fresh tab and closes all others.

modeExceptCurrentAndPinnedTitle.message: Close all tabs except current and pinned tabs

modeExceptCurrentTitle.message: Close all tabs except current tab

modeExceptCurrentDesc.message: Keeps only the active tab in current window.

modeCloseTabsInOtherWindowsTitle.message: Close all tabs in other windows

modeCloseTabsInOtherWindowsDesc.message: Keeps all tabs in the current window untouched.

modeExceptCurrentPinnedGroupedTitle.message: Close all tabs except current, pinned, group tabs

modeExceptCurrentPinnedGroupedDesc.message: Across all windows; keeps active tab, pinned tabs, and grouped tabs.

modeCloseOthersCurrentKeepActivePinnedGr.message: Close other tabs in current window (keep active, pinned, and grouped)
Also closes all tabs in other windows.

optionsSaveExecuteButton.description: Save and execute button text in options

licensePageSubtitle.message: Project and third-party license texts used in this extension.

licenseLoadError.description: Shown when license text cannot be loaded

licensePageBrowserTitle.description: Browser tab title for license page
